headline: Autodesk: High Quality Remains, Price Too High For Now
summary: Autodesk remains a high-quality, wide-moat software leader with robust network effects and persistent pricing power. Read why ADSK stock is a Hold.

headline: Examining Autodesk (ADSK) Valuation After Recent Choppy Share Price Performance
summary: Recent performance context for Autodesk (ADSK) Autodesk (ADSK) has drawn investor attention after a mixed pattern in recent returns, with gains over the past month and year set against weaker performance in the past 3 months and year to date. At the same time, the company reports annual revenue of US$7.2b and net income of US$1.1b. These figures help investors weigh the current share price of US$260.75 against Autodesk’s established software franchise. See our latest analysis for...
